atmosphere.translate: атмосфера, обстановка, воздух, окружающая среда, газообразная оболочка

examples.eng: The house has a cheerful atmosphere.
A thunderstorm had cooled the atmosphere.
a carnival atmosphere in the town
There is a carnival atmosphere in the office.
The atmosphere was festive and jolly.
the charged atmosphere in the room
poison the atmosphere in the office
a country inn with lots of atmosphere
Why not relax and enjoy the atmosphere?
examples.ru: Почему бы не расслабиться и не насладиться атмосферой?

examples.eng: The atmosphere at home was rather tense.
examples.ru: Атмосфера в доме была довольно напряжённой.

examples.eng: The atmosphere in the room was electric.
Heat is released into the atmosphere by cars.
a modern hotel with a homely atmosphere
There was an atmosphere of menace in the city.
The planet's atmosphere cannot support human life.
examples.ru: Атмосфера планеты и не может поддерживать человеческую жизнь.

examples.eng: The calcium reacts with sulphur in the atmosphere.
examples.ru: В атмосфере кальций вступает в реакцию с серой.

examples.eng: the putrid atmosphere of the court
the smoggy atmosphere of Los Angeles
the release of heat into the atmosphere
the heady atmosphere of the early sixties
a movie with a dark and broody atmosphere
examples.ru: фильм с мрачной и депрессивной атмосферой

examples.eng: a restaurant with a countrified atmosphere
The atmosphere became increasingly raucous.
radiation penetrating the Earth's atmosphere
He played some music to liven the atmosphere.
examples.ru: Он сыграл какую-то музыку, чтобы оживить атмосферу.

examples.eng: religious training in a nonsectarian atmosphere
She brings a special atmosphere to our meetings.
examples.ru: Она привносит в наши совещания особую атмосферу.

examples.eng: Minute particles diffused through the atmosphere.
The talks were conducted in a cordial atmosphere.
examples.ru: Переговоры проходили в тёплой дружеской атмосфере.

examples.eng: An atmosphere of optimism dominated the conference.
